---
title: "Tropy Resources"
subtitle: "Tutorials, plugins, and community"
---

## Official Resources

- **Website**: [tropy.org](https://tropy.org)
- **Documentation**: [docs.tropy.org](https://docs.tropy.org)
- **GitHub**: [github.com/tropy/tropy](https://github.com/tropy/tropy)
- **Community forum**: [community.tropy.org](https://community.tropy.org)
- **Plugins**: [tropy.org/plugins](https://tropy.org/plugins)

---

## Video Tutorials

- Tropy official Vimeo channel: [vimeo.com/user104478141](https://vimeo.com/user104478141)
- Tropy YouTube: [youtube.com/@tropyorg](https://www.youtube.com/@tropyorg)

---

## Key Plugins

| Plugin | Function | Link |
|---|---|---|
| **Omeka S Export** | Push items to Omeka S | [github.com/tropy](https://github.com/tropy) |
| **Omeka S Import** | Pull items from Omeka S | [github.com/tropy](https://github.com/tropy) |
| **IIIF Export** | Generate IIIF Manifests | [github.com/tropy](https://github.com/tropy) |
| **CSV Import** | Import records from spreadsheets | [github.com/tropy](https://github.com/tropy) |

---

## Vocabularies for Tropy Templates

Pre-packaged vocabulary schemas for import into Tropy:

- **Dublin Core**: built-in
- **Dublin Core Terms**: built-in
- **CIDOC-CRM**: [github.com/tropy/tropy/tree/main/db/vocabularies](https://github.com/tropy/tropy/tree/main/db/vocabularies)
- **Schema.org**: importable from [schema.org/version/latest/schemaorg-current-https.jsonld](https://schema.org/version/latest/schemaorg-current-https.jsonld)

---

## Selected Publications

- Putnam, L. (2016). *The Transnational and the Text-Searchable*. American Historical Review. — context for digital archival research
- The Programming Historian has several lessons using Tropy: [programminghistorian.org](https://programminghistorian.org) (search "Tropy")
